name: Disk | Read/Write Requests | Too High (Zabbix)
message_rx: (?P<disk>\S+): Disk read/write request responses are too high \(read > (?P<tvalue_read>\d+) ms for 15m or write > (?P<tvalue_write>\d+) ms for 15m\)

test_cases.message: sdb: Disk read/write request responses are too high (read > 120 ms for 15m or write > 120 ms for 15m)
